newspage.item11.abstract: mHealth app combining ML-driven relaxation techniques for anxiety management. Gradient Boosted Trees on the LifeSnaps dataset achieved 80.76% accuracy.
newspage.item12.abstract: Cognitive AI framework using Deep & Cross Network for gamified dietary recommendations. Achieved 92.89% precision and 94.02% AUC-ROC.
newspage.item13.abstract: Mobile calorie management using Mask R-CNN for real-time food instance segmentation. Fine-tuned ResNet50 FPN V2 reached 86% Mean-IoU.
newspage.item14.abstract: Comparative evaluation of LLMs (GPT-4.5, Llama 4, Claude 4, Mistral) for automated e-commerce front-end generation from natural language.
newspage.item15.abstract: AR+AI educational app for sorting algorithms using Unity and AR Foundation. Interactive 3D simulations with AI-driven personalized feedback.
newspage.item16.abstract: Serious game web application combining deep learning for personalized first-year secondary math education. Model achieved 84.1% accuracy.
profile.hero.title: Tech Lead Manager - QA · Professor · Author
profile.about.title: About
profile.about.p1: Tech Lead Manager - QA at OpenLoop with over 10 years of experience in quality engineering across e-commerce, digital platforms and enterprise products. Specialist in test automation architecture using Playwright, Cypress and Serenity BDD, with a strong foundation in ISTQB methodologies.
profile.about.p2: Professor at Universidad Peruana de Ciencias Aplicadas (UPC) teaching Software Engineering. Published author of a comprehensive QA book on Amazon and researcher with 6 IEEE conference papers on applied AI in education and health.
profile.experience.title: Experience
profile.exp0.desc: Driving quality strategy for the telehealth infrastructure powering over 1 million virtual patient visits across all 50 U.S. states.
profile.exp1.desc: Leading quality engineering initiatives across product delivery. Defining automation strategy, CI/CD quality gates, and team enablement processes.
profile.exp2.desc: Led automation and strategy for e-commerce platforms. Implemented Serenity BDD frameworks, API contract testing, and CI/CD pipeline integration with quality gates.
profile.exp3.desc: End-to-end testing for digital platform and e-commerce applications. Built test automation foundations and quality processes from scratch.
profile.exp4.desc: Teaching Software Engineering to undergraduate students. Bridging industry practices with academic foundations in testing, automation and quality assurance.

blog.refs.title: References
blog.refs.intro: All information we provide is backed by authoritative and up-to-date bibliographic sources, ensuring reliable content in line with our editorial principles.
blog.refs.citeExplain: Citing original sources serves to give credit to corresponding authors and avoid plagiarism. It also allows readers to access the original sources to verify or expand information.
blog.card.vibe-testing.title: Vibe Testing: The New AI Testing Paradigm
blog.card.vibe-testing.excerpt: How artificial intelligence is transforming quality assurance workflows, from test generation to intelligent defect prediction.
blog.card.telehealth-qa.title: Building a QA Team from Scratch for Telehealth
blog.card.telehealth-qa.excerpt: Lessons learned from structuring quality engineering in a high-scale telehealth platform serving millions of virtual patient visits.

blog.card.playwright-vs-cypress.excerpt: After years using both tools in production, here is an honest comparison based on real projects, not marketing claims.
blog.card.shift-left.title: Shift-Left Testing: Moving Quality Earlier in the Pipeline
blog.card.shift-left.excerpt: How embedding testing earlier in the development lifecycle reduces costs, catches defects sooner, and transforms QA from a bottleneck into an enabler.
blog.card.e2e-playwright.title: E2E Testing Best Practices with Playwright in 2026
blog.card.e2e-playwright.excerpt: Battle-tested patterns for writing maintainable, reliable end-to-end tests with Playwright — from project structure to CI integration.
blog.card.ai-maintenance.title: AI-Powered Test Maintenance: Reducing Automation Debt
blog.card.ai-maintenance.excerpt: How AI assistants can dramatically reduce the cost of maintaining automated test suites by detecting, classifying, and fixing broken tests.
blog.card.risk-based.title: Risk-Based Testing: Prioritizing What Matters Most
blog.card.risk-based.excerpt: A practical guide to risk-based testing strategies that help QA teams focus effort where it delivers the most value, aligned with ISTQB principles.
blog.card.api-microservices.title: API Testing Patterns for Microservices Architecture
blog.card.api-microservices.excerpt: Practical patterns for testing APIs in microservices architectures — from contract testing to integration strategies that scale.

blog.card.cicd-pipeline.title: CI/CD Pipeline Testing: A Complete Integration Guide
blog.card.cicd-pipeline.excerpt: How to design testing stages in your CI/CD pipeline that balance speed with confidence — from pre-commit hooks to production canaries.
blog.card.quality-gates.title: Quality Gates: When to Ship and When to Stop
blog.card.quality-gates.excerpt: How to define objective quality gates that give teams confidence to ship — or clear signals to stop — without relying on gut feeling.
blog.card.state-automation.title: The State of Test Automation in 2026
blog.card.state-automation.excerpt: An analysis of where test automation stands in 2026 — trends, tool adoption, AI integration, and what the data tells us about the future of QA.
blog.card.manual-to-ai.title: From Manual to AI-Assisted: A QA Transformation Roadmap
blog.card.manual-to-ai.excerpt: A step-by-step roadmap for QA teams transitioning from manual testing to AI-assisted automation — practical stages, common pitfalls, and success metrics.
